RB-DB-004.title: Graceful Database Connection Pool Reset
RB-DB-004.description: Safely recycle stale/leaked database connections in the HikariCP connection pool without full service restart. Closes idle-in-transaction connections and flushes leaked PreparedStatements.
pre_flight_checks: Verify replica database (payments-db-v2-replica) is healthy and in sync
Confirm current active connection count via pg_stat_activity
Ensure no in-flight financial transactions older than 60 seconds

steps.action: Query pg_stat_activity to identify stale idle-in-transaction connections
steps.command: SELECT pid, usename, application_name, state, query_start, now()-query_start AS duration FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'idle in transaction' ORDER BY duration DESC;
steps.expected_outcome: List of PIDs with idle-in-transaction connections and their duration
steps.simulated_result: Found 97 idle-in-transaction connections. Oldest: 342s (PID 12847, checkout-service BillingProcessor)

steps.action: Terminate idle-in-transaction connections older than 30 seconds
steps.command: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'idle in transaction' AND now() - query_start > interval '30 seconds';
steps.expected_outcome: Stale connections terminated, pool slots freed
steps.simulated_result: Terminated 94 stale connections. 6 connections retained (age < 30s). Pool usage: 6/100.

steps.action: Trigger HikariCP soft eviction on checkout-service via JMX endpoint
steps.expected_outcome: HikariCP pool evicts idle connections and re-establishes fresh pool
steps.simulated_result: HikariCP pool reset acknowledged. Pool recycling in progress. Active connections: 8/100.

steps.action: Monitor checkout-service health endpoint for 60 seconds
steps.expected_outcome: Health check returns UP with DB status healthy
steps.simulated_result: Health check: UP. DB status: HEALTHY. Pool usage: 12/100 after 60s.

steps.action: Validate end-to-end checkout flow with synthetic transaction
steps.simulated_result: Synthetic order INC-TEST-892 completed. HTTP 200 OK. Latency: 145ms.

rollback.description: If pool reset fails, initiate full checkout-service rolling restart

success_criteria: Connection pool usage < 60% for 10 consecutive minutes

RB-DB-001.title: Emergency Database Connection Kill — Immediate
RB-DB-001.description: Force-terminate ALL non-superuser connections to the database. Use only when graceful reset (RB-DB-004) is not possible or already failed.
pre_flight_checks: Confirm RB-DB-004 has been attempted and failed
Verify replica is healthy for emergency failover if needed

steps.command: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE pid <> pg_backend_pid() AND usename NOT IN ('postgres', 'replicator');
steps.simulated_result: Terminated 100 connections. Pool cleared. Applications will reconnect with backoff.

steps.command: SELECT count(*), state FROM pg_stat_activity GROUP BY state;

rollback.description: Initiate emergency failover to replica if primary remains unstable

RB-DB-002.title: Database Failover to Read Replica
RB-DB-002.description: Promote payments-db-v2-replica to primary. Last resort when primary is unrecoverable.
pre_flight_checks: Confirm no in-flight write transactions on primary

steps.simulated_result: Replication lag: 2.3 seconds. Safe to proceed.
Replica promoted. New primary: payments-db-v2-replica (now primary).

RB-CACHE-001.title: Flush Redis Cache — Selective
RB-CACHE-001.description: Flush specific Redis keyspaces to resolve cache poisoning or stale data issues.
pre_flight_checks: Confirm DB can handle cache miss load spike

steps.command: redis-cli -h cache-service.internal SCAN 0 MATCH 'checkout:session:*' COUNT 1000 | xargs redis-cli DEL
steps.expected_outcome: Stale keys removed. Next requests will repopulate from DB.

RB-SVC-001.title: Rolling Service Restart
RB-SVC-001.description: Perform a rolling restart of the specified service deployment. Restarts pods one-at-a-time to maintain availability.
pre_flight_checks: Verify Kubernetes deployment is healthy before restart
Confirm minimum replica count >= 2 for zero-downtime

steps.simulated_result: Rolling restart initiated. Replacing pods: 1/5 complete.

steps.expected_outcome: All pods restarted successfully within 5 minutes
steps.simulated_result: Rollout complete. 5/5 pods running with fresh connections. Pool usage: 8/100.
